commands.name: api
list
commands.description:
Lists all APIs linked to the current entity or 
context.

commands.name: new
commands.description:
Creates a new API within the selected service or 
module.
Manages APIs.
examples:
api new --name MyApi --service MyService --module MyModule --entity 
MyEntity

commands.name: auth
login
commands.description: Logs the user into the Lino CLI.

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Logs the user out of the tool.
Manages user authentication features.

commands.name: build
commands.description:
Builds the defined services and web applications and 
generates their Docker images.

commands.name: command
list
commands.description: Lists commands associated with an entity.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new command in the application layer.
Manages commands.
examples:
command new --name MyCommand --service MyService --module MyModule 
--entity MyEntity

commands.name: database
apply
commands.description:
Applies pending migrations in the specified 
service or module.

commands.name: list
commands.description:
Lists migrations that have been applied or are 
pending in the selected context.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Generates a new database migration.

commands.name: revert
commands.description: Reverts the last applied migration.
Manages the full lifecycle of database migrations.

commands.name: entity
edit
commands.description: Edits properties or settings of an existing entity.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists all entities in a service or module.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new domain entity.
Manages entities within the service or module.

commands.name: enumeration
edit
commands.description: Edits an existing enumeration.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists enumerations available in the service or module.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates an enumeration in the domain layer.
Manages enumerations.

commands.name: event
edit
commands.description: Edits a domain or integration event.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists events associated with the entity.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a domain or integration event.
Manages events.
examples:
event new --name MyEvent --service MyService --module MyModule --entity
MyEntity

commands.name: event-handler
list
commands.description:
Lists all handlers linked to events in the current 
context.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new event handler.
Manages event handlers.
examples:
event-handler new --name MyEventHandler --service MyService --module 
MyModule --entity MyEntity

commands.name: feature
auth
add
commands.description:
Adds full authentication and authorization support
to the project.
Manages authentication and authorization settings.

commands.name: background-job
add
commands.description: Adds support for background task processing.
Manages support for background task processing.
Manages global project features.

commands.name: module
list
commands.description: Lists existing modules in the current service.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new module within a modularized service.
Manages modules in modularized services.

commands.name: page
edit
commands.description: Edits properties or settings of an existing page.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists pages linked to an entity.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Generates a new page within the project.
Manages web pages.

commands.name: preferences
culture
set

options.name: --name
options.description:
en | pt | es | de | fr | it | ja | ko | ru | 
zh

commands.description:
Changes the current language/culture used by the 
tool.
Manages the CLI’s default language/culture.
Manages the user’s global preferences in the CLI.

commands.name: project
list
commands.description: Lists projects already created with Lino.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Starts a new .NET project with a full structure.
Manages projects in Lino CLI.

commands.name: query
list
commands.description: Lists queries defined for an entity.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new query in the application layer.
Manages queries.
examples:
query new --name MyQuery --service MyService --module MyModule --entity
MyEntity

commands.name: service
list
commands.description: Lists services already created in the project.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a new service — simple or modularized.
Manages services within the project.

commands.name: user
register
commands.description: Registers a new user via CLI.
Manages users in the tool.

commands.name: value-object
edit
commands.description: Edits an existing value object.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists value objects related to the current context.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Creates a value object in the domain.
Manages value objects.

commands.name: version
bump
commands.description:
Increments the version of a service or web application
following semantic versioning (SemVer).

commands.name: list
commands.description:
Lists the current versions of all services and web 
applications.

commands.name: show
commands.description: Shows the current version of a specific service.
Manages service versions.

commands.name: web-app
new
commands.description: Adds a web application to the project.
Manages web applications.
